summary: Complete end-to-end testing of GRS Global Lab Logistics & ERP System - All features working perfectly
passed_tests: Dashboard loads with correct stats (1 Job, 1 Client, $37,000 Value, $450 Fees)
Jobs page displays job list with Diamond Trading Co.
Job detail modal opens showing job information and 2 stones (Ruby, Sapphire)
3-level nested modals working perfectly (Dashboard → Jobs → Job Detail → Stone Detail)
Stone modal opens with Ruby stone details and verbal findings form
Verbal findings form has 4 searchable dropdowns (Identification, Color, Origin, Comment)
Dropdown options populated from backend API (111 total options)
Searchable dropdown functionality working - can filter and select options
Identification dropdown working with NATURAL RUBY selection
Color dropdown working with multiple color options (RED, VIVID RED, DEEP RED, etc.)
All API endpoints working (8/8 backend tests passed)
All navigation pages load correctly (Shipments, Clients, Stones, Settings)
Shipments page shows 2 shipments with Create Shipment button
Clients page shows Diamond Trading Co. client details
Stones page shows both Ruby and Sapphire stones with full details
Settings page shows profile information and system settings
